* feat(community): add graceful degradation for X engage on Free tier

community-manager agent falls back to manual mode — prompting for
tweet URLs instead of fetching mentions automatically. The rest
of the pipeline (brand-voice draft, approval, post-tweet) runs
unchanged.

- Mark get_request 403 error message as agent contract in x-community.sh

Closes #496

commit.message:
Real ABN verification via ABR API — no more fake Smoky Joe result

- POST /api/verify-abn: validates ABN checksum (ATO algorithm) then hits the
  live ABR XML web service (abn.business.gov.au) to confirm entity name + status
- Returns real entity name (organisation or individual) and Active/Cancelled status
- Rejects cancelled/invalid ABNs with a clear error message
- Falls back to checksum-only result if ABR_GUID env var not configured
- signup-vendor.html: verifyABN() is now async, calls real endpoint, shows
  actual business name from the register — removes hardcoded "Smoky Joe's BBQ"

commit.message:
feat(auth): Keycloak OIDC with basic auth fallback (#1)

* feat(auth): add Keycloak OIDC with basic auth fallback

Server-side:
- config.rs: AuthConfig with AuthMode::Keycloak / AuthMode::Basic
  detection from env vars (KEYCLOAK_URL, KEYCLOAK_REALM, etc.)
- auth.rs: Basic credential validation, Keycloak userinfo token
  validation, unified validate_request()
- auth_middleware.rs: Axum middleware protecting API routes,
  optional X-API-Key for /ingest/* endpoints
- GET /auth/mode discovery endpoint for dashboard
- Box::leak config for &'static lifetime (certifai pattern)
- Added base64, reqwest, dotenvy dependencies

Dashboard-side:
- auth/state.rs: AuthState enum (Loading/Authenticated/Unauthenticated),
  AuthToken (Bearer/Basic), UserInfo
- pages/login.rs: Adaptive login page (Keycloak redirect or Basic
  auth form) based on server's auth mode
- main.rs: Auth state context provider, session storage persistence,
  auth mode discovery on startup, auth guard in AppLayout
- navbar.rs: User initial + name display, logout button
- api/client.rs: AuthToken support, get_auth_mode() method

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(auth): resolve CORS preflight blocking and use dx serve proxy

Pass OPTIONS requests through auth middleware so CORS preflight
succeeds. Replace fragile port-replacement hack with dx serve proxy
configuration for development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update CLAUDE.md with auth, dashboard, and server module maps

Add authentication docs, development workflow for dx serve + server,
module maps for ferrite-server and ferrite-dashboard, and ignore
SQLite database files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(server): resolve clippy warnings in auth modules

Remove needless borrows on &'static ref and allow dead_code on
UserClaims fields (used via request extensions).

Add Poppins font, h2 uppercase, Business section with photos

- Add Poppins (800) as h2 font (matching sandbox.co.kr style)
- Add text-transform: uppercase to all .h2 elements
- Fix em spacing issue after uppercase transform
- Redesign About → Business section: 2-panel dark layout with biz1/biz2 photos
- Remove ghost numbers (01/02) from panels
- Increase hover glow 2x via ::before overlay opacity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: scope inbox intelligence polling to logged-in user only, skip on localhost

- Poll only the calling user's mailbox (not all opted-in users)
- Skip polling on localhost/LAN to avoid duplicate processing with Vercel
- Replace expensive per-cycle uncategorised sweep with one-time backfill (200 msgs)
- Reduce poll interval from 5min to 2min (cheap now that it's single-user delta only)
- Add backfilled_at column to user_inbox_poll_cursors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ticket attachments: add storage RLS policies, delay email send

Root cause: ticket-attachments storage bucket had NO RLS policies,
causing all user-initiated uploads to fail silently.

- Add SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies scoped to tenant folder
- Add DB trigger trg_fix_attachment_urls to auto-correct undefined/ paths
- Change email send in useCreateTicket to fire-and-forget with 8s delay
  so attachments can be uploaded before email is triggered
- Edge function idempotency check prevents duplicate emails

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: fix SOPS key permissions and add 1Password-managed SSH config

- Rename home-ops.key.tmpl → private_home-ops.key.tmpl so chezmoi
  deploys the SOPS age key with 600 permissions (was 644)
- Add private_dot_ssh/private_config.tmpl pulling ~/.ssh/config
  content from 1Password vault (op://Private/SSH Config/notesPlain)
- Add SSH Config section to post_install_notes with vault setup steps

commit.message:
Switch low-frequency hooks from async to sync to reduce CLI noise (#50)

Async hooks display "Async hook X completed" messages in Claude Code
output, which is noisy for hooks that fire at natural conversation
breaks. Keep only PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and PostToolUseFailure as
async since they fire for every tool call and would add cumulative
latency on the hot path.

commit.message:
fix: Brain AI backfill calls one entity type at a time to avoid timeout

- Separate calls per entity type (accounts, categories, articles, projects)
  instead of all-at-once which hit 60s edge function timeout at 342 accounts
- Each type loops until remaining = 0 (max 20 rounds × 50 items)
- Memory backfill loops separately after entities
- UI shows real-time step-by-step progress with per-type checkmarks
- Button shows current step label: "Conti: 150 (192 rimanenti)"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Phase 1 foundation: DB schema, auth guard, role-based dashboards

- Supabase schema: profiles, organizations, memberships, subjects, sessions, availability
- Auto-create profile trigger on signup
- Row Level Security policies
- Auth proxy (route guard): protects /dashboard, redirects logged-in users away from auth pages
- Role-based routing: student → /dashboard/student, teacher → /dashboard/teacher, admin → /dashboard/admin
- Glassmorphism sidebar with nav per role + language toggle + sign out
- Dashboard pages: Student (sessions, instructors), Teacher (today/upcoming, availability CTA), Admin (stats, recent users)
- Bilingual stat cards, headers, and all dashboard copy (EN / ZH-TW)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refactor: parking_lot migration, unwrap elimination, hot path optimization, DRY, dialog decomposition, red error status

- Migrate std::sync::Mutex to parking_lot::Mutex across 9 files (no poisoning, faster)
- Eliminate production .unwrap() calls with let-else and .expect() patterns
- Cache column headers and pre-compute file size/date strings to reduce per-frame allocations
- Remove UI-thread blocking path.exists() call in history dialog
- Unify duplicate format_bytes/format_size, extract clear_previews_except helper
- Show error status messages in red bold text via set_status/set_status_error methods
- Decompose 553-line show_dialogs() into 9 focused functions
- Add missing copy_file_or_dir (non-overwrite) to fix pre-existing test compilation errors
- Document refactoring workflow in CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Nginx cache policy — always serve fresh index.html

Root cause: location = /index.html only matched exact path,
but SPA fallback via try_files served cached HTML without
no-cache headers. Users saw stale versions after deploy.

Fix: Move no-cache to location / block, add long cache for
/assets/ (Vite hashed) and 7d cache for /images/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

CLAUDE.md: refocus as behavioral onboarding doc; move technical reference to architecture.md

Remove Secrets, Admin Panel, Game-Specific Notes, and On-VM Log Locations sections —
all fully covered in docs/architecture.md. Trim Repo Layout and Common Commands.

fix: use paid_date instead of period_end for payroll balance filter

Payroll records have period_end in the future (e.g. April 7) even when

records (3.9M) from the balance. Now filters by paid_date — the actual
date money left the account.

commit.message:
feat(samples): [Global Attributes 6] Showcase scope attributes in all sample modules (#5149)

* feat(core): Add scope-level attributes API

Add setAttribute, setAttributes, removeAttribute, and getAttributes
to IScope/IScopes/Sentry so users can set attributes on the scope
that are automatically included in logs and metrics events.

Also refactor type inference logic into SentryAttributeType.inferFrom
and add SentryLogEventAttributeValue.fromAttribute factory method,
removing duplicate getType helpers from LoggerApi and MetricsApi.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* changelog

* ref: Split out LoggerApi/MetricsApi changes for stacked PR

Move factory method extractions (SentryAttributeType.inferFrom,
SentryLogEventAttributeValue.fromAttribute) and LoggerApi/MetricsApi
scope attribute integration to a separate stacked PR.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(core): Wire scope attributes into LoggerApi and MetricsApi

Extract factory methods SentryAttributeType.inferFrom and
SentryLogEventAttributeValue.fromAttribute to reduce duplication.
Apply scope attributes to log and metric events automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* changelog

* feat(samples): Showcase scope attributes in Spring Boot 4 samples

Add Sentry.setAttribute() calls to PersonController and
MetricController across all Spring Boot 4 sample variants to
demonstrate scope attributes being auto-attached to logs and metrics.

Add e2e test assertions and TestHelper methods to verify scope
attributes appear on captured log and metric events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* changelog

* Revert "changelog"

This reverts commit 7189bdca1a211085608f16bf3443c9e6675b6680.

* ref: Remove redundant comments from variant controllers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ref: Limit scope attributes sample to base Spring Boot 4 variant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Detect integer attribute type correctly for all integer Number subtypes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* changelog

* feat: Support collections and arrays in log attribute type inference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* changelog

* test: Add coverage for arrayAttribute factory method

Add arrayAttribute and named array attribute usage to the four
attribute tests in ScopesTest (log, count metric, distribution metric,
gauge metric) to verify the factory method works end-to-end.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(samples): Showcase scope attributes in all sample modules

Add Sentry.setAttribute() calls to all sample source files and
corresponding attribute assertions to all system tests. This extends
the scope attributes showcase from sentry-samples-spring-boot-4 to
all 19 remaining sample modules with system tests.

commit.message:
feat: LINE webhook diagnostics — self-service debugging without Cloudflare logs

Add 3 diagnostic endpoints + owner UI card for webhook troubleshooting:

A. GET /api/line/webhook/diagnostics?tenantId=
   - Config status (secret/token/destination/AI/internal token)
   - Last webhook receipt + last processing result
   - Problem list with actionable hints

B. POST /api/line/webhook/debug-simulate?tenantId=
   - Simulates webhook branching for given text
   - Returns branch, intent, salesLabel without calling LINE API
   - Safe read-only operation

C. GET /api/line/webhook/last-result?tenantId=
   - Returns last webhook processing result from KV
   - Includes branch, reply status, error reason, timestamp

D. Owner UI (/owner/sales-lines)
   - Webhook diagnostics card with status badges
   - Ready/NotReady, Secret, Token, Destination, Flow type
   - Problems list, last webhook, last result display
   - Inline branch simulation (text input + execute)

Workers: POST/GET /internal/line/last-result (KV persistence, 7d TTL)
Webhook: persists result to KV after every processing
